label: Healthcare Identifier Redaction
description: Healthcare-oriented representative note snippets with synthetic MRN, insurance, and ICD-10 values that are safe for source control.

cases.label: Representative triage note with MRN and ICD-10
cases.input: Triage note: Patient MRN: 7654321 admitted with diagnosis E11.65 and stable vitals.
cases.expected: Triage note: Patient MRN: [MRN_REDACTED] admitted with diagnosis [ICD10_REDACTED] and stable vitals.

cases.label: Insurance identifier with label
cases.input: Billing summary: Insurance ID: ABC12345678 verified before submission.
cases.expected: Billing summary: Insurance ID: [INSURANCE_REDACTED] verified before submission.

cases.label: Incomplete ICD code is ignored
cases.input: Discussion of category E11 should remain visible without an extension.
cases.expected: Discussion of category E11 should remain visible without an extension.

cases.label: Standalone digits do not trigger healthcare redaction
cases.input: Room 7654321 is a location code and remains unchanged.
cases.expected: Room 7654321 is a location code and remains unchanged.
